items.label: Post an episode
items.description: Pick an episode from a configured feed and post it to the subreddit.

items.label: Configure Podcast Poster
items.description: Open App Settings to configure RSS feeds and posting options.

appEnabled.label: App Enabled
appEnabled.helpText: Turn this on to enable automatic checking and posting of new podcast episodes.

feedUrls.label: RSS Feed URLs
feedUrls.helpText: One feed per line, format: URL | Podcast Name | Link URL. Only the URL is required. See the README for examples and details. Don't know the RSS feed URL? Search for the podcast at podcastindex.org to find it.

postFlairId.label: Post Flair Template ID
postFlairId.helpText: Optional. The flair template ID to apply to each episode post. Find this in your subreddit's Flair settings (it looks like a UUID).

postFlairText.label: Post Flair Text Override
postFlairText.helpText: Optional. Custom flair text to display. Only used when a Flair Template ID is set above.

includePodcastNameInTitle.label: Include Podcast Name in Post Title
includePodcastNameInTitle.helpText: When enabled (default), posts are titled 'Podcast Name - Episode Title'. When disabled, only the episode title is used.

stickyPost.label: Highlight New Episode Posts
stickyPost.helpText: When enabled, each new episode post is stickied to the top of the subreddit and previously highlighted posts shift down, keeping up to 4 recent episodes pinned at once. Once all slots are full, the oldest is unstickied.

listenButtonColor.label: Accent Color
listenButtonColor.helpText: Optional CSS color applied to buttons, links, and other accent elements (e.g. #ff5733 or coral). Leave blank to use the default Reddit blue.

listenButtonPosition.label: Listen Button Position
listenButtonPosition.helpText: Where to show the Listen button relative to the episode description.

includeEpisodeNumberInTitle.label: Include Episode Number in Post Title
includeEpisodeNumberInTitle.helpText: When enabled, the episode number is added to the post title. Example: 'My Podcast - Ep. 42 - Great Interview'. If a feed doesn't provide an episode number, the title falls back to the normal format.

feedHistoryLimit.label: Feed History Depth
feedHistoryLimit.helpText: How many recent episodes to load in the episode picker. Higher values let you find older episodes but may be slower to load. Default: 50.

webViewFont.label: Post Font
webViewFont.helpText: Font used in episode posts. 'System / Reddit' matches the OS font used by the Reddit app — it looks at home on any device.
